summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of KiloLab BecomeWasher page redesign completed. All 17 features tested successfully. Hero section with dark theme, gradient text, badge, CTAs, and stats badges all working. Benefits section with 3 cards, 4-step process, earnings simulator with slider (10-100kg range), testimonials section, and final CTA all render correctly. Form step 1 with all fields and navigation (Retour button) working. Logo visibility fix verified - 'Kilolab' now fully visible on /become-washer page. Landing page, Login, Tarifs pages all working correctly with French translations.

issues: There's a faint 'KILOLAB' watermark visible in the background (intentional branding) but doesn't affect usability

passed_tests: BecomeWasher hero (/become-washer): displays 'Votre machine tourne. Votre compte aussi.' title with gradient text
BecomeWasher hero: has '500+ Washers actifs en France' badge with animated dot
BecomeWasher hero: two CTA buttons - 'Commencer l'inscription' (white) and 'Simuler mes revenus'
BecomeWasher: 'Pourquoi nous rejoindre' section with 3 benefit cards (Revenus complémentaires, Travaillez de chez vous, Plateforme sécurisée)
BecomeWasher: '4 étapes pour commencer' step-by-step section (Inscrivez-vous, Validation express, Recevez des missions, Soyez payé)
BecomeWasher: Earnings simulator with slider (10-100kg), shows monthly/weekly/annual revenue - calculation correct (50kg = 560€/mois)
BecomeWasher: Testimonials section with 3 washer testimonials (Marie L., Karim B., Sophie R.)
BecomeWasher: Final CTA 'Prêt à transformer votre machine en revenus?' with 'Devenir Washer maintenant' button
BecomeWasher: Click 'Commencer l'inscription' -> shows form step 1 with name/email/phone/city/postal/address fields
BecomeWasher: Progress bar at top of form (3 steps)
BecomeWasher: 'Retour' button in form step 1 goes back to landing
Landing page (/) works correctly with all translations
Navbar logo 'Kilolab' is fully visible on all pages including /become-washer (logo fix confirmed)
Footer correctly displayed with translated content (SERVICES, PARTENAIRES, LÉGAL, CONTACT)
Settings page (/settings) redirects to /select-dashboard (protected route working)
Login page (/login) loads with translated form (Connexion, Email, Mot de passe, Se connecter)
Tarifs page (/tarifs) loads with Standard (3€/kg) and Premium (5€/kg) pricing cards
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu visible, hero elements display correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
critical_code_review_comments: Logo fix verified - '/become-washer' removed from isDarkHero array in Navbar.tsx line 18
Good data-testid coverage on interactive elements (washer-hero-title, cta-inscription, simulator-slider, cta-final)
French translations rendering correctly (é, è, à, ê accents all display properly)
React Router future flag warnings in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - non-blocking but noted for future

success_rate.backend: N/A - Supabase external (skipped as per request)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BecomeWasher page redesign fully tested. All sections working: hero with dark theme and gradient text, benefits cards, 4-step process, earnings simulator, testimonials, and final CTA. Form step 1 tested (steps 2-4 require Supabase integration). Landing page, Login, Tarifs, and protected routes all tested. Logo visibility issue from iteration_4 is now fixed.
